edges.evidence_quote: In October 2013, a deal was brokered to 'patch over' the Finks ahead of a proposed ban on the Finks under anti-gang legislation in Queensland. An estimated 90% of the Finks' members joined the Mongols.
edges.context: Mongols absorbed most Finks members in a patch-over in 2013.

edges.evidence_quote: A turf war between the Mongols and the Finks in South East Queensland subsequently broke out following Bowden's death, involving firebombings and bashings.
edges.context: Mongols and Finks engaged in a turf war after Bowden's death in 2020.

edges.evidence_quote: A German chapter of the Mongols MC was founded in Bremen by members of the local crime syndicate run by Lebanese immigrants in 2010.
edges.context: Miri-Clan members founded the Mongols Bremen chapter.

edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Mongols and the Hells Angels took part in a mass brawl in the bar of the Van der Valk Hotel in Rotterdam, during which several shots were fired, on the evening of 7 April 2016.
edges.context: Mongols and Hells Angels fought in a brawl in Rotterdam in 2016.

edges.evidence_quote: The Hells Angels voted unanimously at a club meeting on July 7, 1977 in favor of declaring war on their rivals.
edges.context: Hells Angels declared war on Mongols in 1977 over the California rocker patch.

edges.evidence_quote: In January 2020, the Mongols were involved in a turf war with the Mongrel Mob in the Bay of Plenty, which involved semi-automatic weapons, tit-for-tat shootings and arson attacks.
edges.context: Mongols and Mongrel Mob fought a turf war in New Zealand in 2020.

edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Mexican Mafia – Sureño coalition, the Nuestra Familia – Norteño alliance, the Nazi Lowriders, and the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.context: Mongols are allied with Mexican Mafia.

edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Mexican Mafia – Sureño coalition, the Nuestra Familia – Norteño alliance, the Nazi Lowriders, and the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.context: Mongols are allied with Sureños.

edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Mexican Mafia – Sureño coalition, the Nuestra Familia – Norteño alliance, the Nazi Lowriders, and the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.context: Mongols are allied with Nuestra Familia.

edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Mexican Mafia – Sureño coalition, the Nuestra Familia – Norteño alliance, the Nazi Lowriders, and the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.context: Mongols are allied with Norteños.

edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Mexican Mafia – Sureño coalition, the Nuestra Familia – Norteño alliance, the Nazi Lowriders, and the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.context: Mongols are allied with Nazi Lowriders.

edges.evidence_quote: The club is allied with the Mexican Mafia – Sureño coalition, the Nuestra Familia – Norteño alliance, the Nazi Lowriders, and the Tijuana Cartel.
edges.context: Mongols are allied with Tijuana Cartel.

edges.evidence_quote: Rival gangs include the Bandidos, the Hells Angels, the Iron Order, the Outlaws, and the Vagos.
edges.context: Mongols consider Bandidos as rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: Rival gangs include the Bandidos, the Hells Angels, the Iron Order, the Outlaws, and the Vagos.
edges.context: Mongols consider Iron Order as rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: Rival gangs include the Bandidos, the Hells Angels, the Iron Order, the Outlaws, and the Vagos.
edges.context: Mongols consider Outlaws as rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: Rival gangs include the Bandidos, the Hells Angels, the Iron Order, the Outlaws, and the Vagos.
edges.context: Mongols consider Vagos as rivals.

edges.evidence_quote: The club founded a chapter in Tucson in May 1982, which led to a war with an existing chapter of the Dirty Dozen over control of prostitution rackets in the area.
edges.context: Mongols warred with Dirty Dozen in Tucson in 1982.

edges.evidence_quote: The Mongols aligned themselves with the Outlaws, who had established themselves in Tucson in September 1980.
edges.context: Mongols allied with Outlaws in Tucson in 1982.

edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Glendale Mongols chapter, along with bikers from the San Bernardino chapter of the Hells Angels, the Straight Satans of Venice, and the Glendale Night Riders, committed a sexual assault on a fifteen-year-old girl in August 1972.
edges.context: Mongols, Hells Angels, Straight Satans, and Glendale Night Riders jointly committed a sexual assault in 1972.

edges.evidence_quote: Members of the Glendale Mongols chapter, along with bikers from the San Bernardino chapter of the Hells Angels, the Straight Satans of Venice, and the Glendale Night Riders, committed a sexual assault on a fifteen-year-old girl in August 1972.
edges.context: Mongols, Hells Angels, Straight Satans, and Glendale Night Riders jointly committed a sexual assault in 1972.

edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Mexican Mafia, Nazi Lowriders, Norteños, Nuestra Familia, Sureños, Tijuana Cartel, Pagans MC
edges.context: Mongols list Pagans MC as an ally in the infobox.

edges.evidence_quote: Seeking an end to hostilities, the Mongols and the Hells Angels signed a peace agreement.
edges.context: The Mongols and Hells Angels signed a peace agreement to end hostilities.

edges.evidence_quote: The feud between the clubs in Southern California was reactivated, however, by a fight at the first annual Easyriders trade show...
edges.context: The feud between the clubs was reactivated after a fight at a trade show.

edges.evidence_quote: By 2002, the Mongols had begun establishing a presence in Northern California, in defiance of the peace treaty with the Hells Angels...
edges.context: Mongols expanded into Northern California in defiance of the peace treaty, causing tension.

edges.evidence_quote: On April 27, 2002, between 60 and 70 members of the Mongols and the Hells Angels took part in a brawl and shoot-out on the casino floor at Harrah's Laughlin...
edges.context: A brawl and shoot-out between Mongols and Hells Angels at Harrah's Laughlin resulted in three deaths.

edges.evidence_quote: Christopher Bryan 'Stoney' Ablett, a member of the Mongols' Modesto chapter, stabbed and shot San Francisco Hells Angels chapter president Mark 'Papa' Guardado to death...
edges.context: A Mongol member killed the Hells Angels San Francisco chapter president.

edges.evidence_quote: On September 18, 2008, three pipe bombs exploded in the driveway of the San Jose home of Robert Rios, the president of the Mongols' Santa Clara chapter. The ATF described the bombing... as a possible act of retaliation by the Angels for the death of Guardado.
edges.context: Hells Angels possibly retaliated against Mongols with pipe bombs after Guardado's murder.

edges.evidence_quote: On November 8, 2008, Hells Angels member Robert Daniel Thompson was shot several times and wounded by Mongols biker Eric Gunner 'The Mayor' Lundin...
edges.context: A Mongol shot and wounded a Hells Angels member.

edges.evidence_quote: Mongols 'prospect' Jose Luis Sanchez injured three people when he fired eight to ten rounds from a semi-automatic pistol into a crowd... in an attempt to shoot a Hells Angels biker...
edges.context: A Mongol prospect fired into a crowd trying to shoot a Hells Angels member.

edges.evidence_quote: Two Hells Angels members suffered stab wounds during a brawl involving dozens of Mongols and Hells Angels bikers... on Interstate 15 near Temecula, on March 22, 2014.
edges.context: A brawl between Mongols and Hells Angels on Interstate 15 resulted in stab wounds.

edges.evidence_quote: On September 20, 2014, Mongols and Hells Angels exchanged gunfire near Corona.
edges.context: Mongols and Hells Angels exchanged gunfire near Corona.

edges.evidence_quote: Mongols member Joshua Ryan Herbert opened fire with a revolver on a group of five Hells Angels bikers... on May 21, 2017, killing one Hells Angel, James Duty, and wounding another.
edges.context: A Mongol member shot and killed a Hells Angel and wounded another.

edges.evidence_quote: On May 5, 2018, members of the Hells Angels were attending a motorcycle wash fundraiser... when Mongols bikers arrived, prompting a confrontation between the rival clubs.
edges.context: A confrontation between Mongols and Hells Angels at a fundraiser led to a shooting.

edges.evidence_quote: Prior to the presidency of Ruben "Doc" Cavazos , the Mongols were allied with the Mexican Mafia , on the street and in prison.
edges.context: Mongols were allied with Mexican Mafia before Cavazos' presidency.

edges.evidence_quote: the Mongols began recruiting members from Sureño street gangs, including the Avenues and 18th Street , during the 1990s.
edges.context: Mongols recruited members from Avenues.

edges.evidence_quote: the Mongols began recruiting members from Sureño street gangs, including the Avenues and 18th Street , during the 1990s.
edges.context: Mongols recruited members from 18th Street.

edges.evidence_quote: Tensions between the Mongols and the Hells Angels increased as the Mongols expanded into the Angels' home territory of Northern California .
edges.context: Mongols and Hells Angels have tensions and a violent confrontation in 2002.

edges.evidence_quote: In January 2004, a group of Mongols took part in a narcotics transaction with members of the Bassett Grande street gang at a motel room in Arcadia , purchasing a wholesale quantity of methamphetamine to sell on the retail market.
edges.context: Mongols conducted a drug transaction with Bassett Grande.

edges.evidence_quote: On January 10, 2004, a Mongols member from San Jose , a Norteño area, was shot and killed after a confrontation with members of the Sangra Sureño gang in the parking lot of a motel in Rosemead .
edges.context: Sangra Sureño killed a Mongols member.

edges.evidence_quote: The following month, the Mongols responded that they would refuse to pay extortion money to La Eme , causing a war which resulted in casualties on each side.
edges.context: Mongols refused to pay extortion to Mexican Mafia, leading to a war.

edges.evidence_quote: The conflict between the Mongols and the Mexican Mafia was ultimately resolved, and the gangs continue to cooperate in drug trafficking.
edges.context: After conflict, Mongols and Mexican Mafia resolved and now cooperate in drug trafficking.
